# Abhay Tours and Travels Directory

Welcome to the LLM agent and crawler information index for Abhay Tours and Travels. This document contains structured overview files, paths, and metadata about our service directory.

Website URL: https://www.abhaytravels.co.in
Industry: Travel Agency
Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
Contact: Phone: +919019974147 | Email: info@abhaytravels.co.in
Hours: 24/7

## Core Service Catalog
- [Airport Taxi Service](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/services/airport-taxi-service/): Reliable airport taxi service for Kempegowda International Airport (KIAL) pickups and drops. Guaranteed on-time arrival, flight tracking and 24/7 support.
- [Local Taxi Service](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/services/local-taxi-service/): Book hourly cab service in Bangalore for shopping, meetings, hospital visits and city travel. Packages from 4 hours to full-day hire with verified drivers.
- [Outstation Taxi Service](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/services/outstation-taxi-service/): Comfortable outstation cab service from Bangalore to Mysore, Coorg, Ooty, Chikmagalur and beyond. One-way and round-trip with driver bata included.
- [Corporate Travel Service](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/services/corporate-travel-service/): End-to-end corporate transportation for tech parks, client visits and employee commuting. Fleet of sedans, SUVs, Tempo Travellers and buses with monthly packages.
- [Hotel Booking Service](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/services/hotel-booking-service/): Book budget to luxury hotels across Karnataka and India with our travel desk assistance. Best-rate guarantee with curated property recommendations.
- [Tour Package Booking](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/services/tour-package-booking/): Customized holiday packages for families, groups and corporate travelers. Coorg, Ooty, Mysore, Chikmagalur, Kerala and Goa packages with transport, hotel and sightseeing.

- [Bus 50 Seater](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/vehicles/bus-50-seater/): Ashok Leyland 50 Seater Bus (50 seats, AC). Outstation: 45/km.

## Popular Outstation Routes
- [Bangalore to Mysore Taxi](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/routes/bangalore-to-mysore/): 145km, approx. 3.5 hrs. Fares from ₹1740.

## Travel Blog & Guides
- [Complete Guide to Bangalore Airport Taxi Services](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/blog/bangalore-airport-taxi-guide/): Learn how to book reliable airport taxi services in Bengaluru, pricing information, pickup tips and travel recommendations.
- [Best Time to Book an Airport Taxi in Bengaluru](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/blog/best-time-to-book-airport-taxi/): Discover the ideal time to book airport cabs and avoid last-minute surge pricing.
- [Top Weekend Destinations from Bangalore](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/blog/top-weekend-destinations-from-bangalore/): Explore Coorg, Ooty, Chikmagalur, Mysore and other popular weekend getaway destinations.
- [Best Vehicles for Family Trips from Bengaluru](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/blog/best-family-trip-vehicles/): Compare sedan, SUV, MUV and tempo traveller options for comfortable family travel.
- [Corporate Cab Services for Bengaluru Companies](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/blog/corporate-cab-services-guide/): Everything businesses need to know about corporate transportation and employee travel solutions.
- [Why Corporate Cab Services Save Business Costs](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/blog/why-corporate-cabs-save-money/): Learn how organized transportation helps companies reduce travel costs and improve employee productivity.
- [Hotel Booking Tips Every Traveler Should Know](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/blog/hotel-booking-tips-for-travelers/): Helpful hotel booking tips for business travelers, families and vacation planners.
- [Resort vs Hotel: Which is Better for Your Trip](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/blog/resort-vs-hotel-which-is-better/): Understand the differences between resorts and hotels before planning your next holiday.
- [Bangalore to Mysore Road Trip Guide](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/blog/bangalore-to-mysore-road-trip-guide/): Distance, routes, attractions and travel tips for a memorable Bengaluru to Mysore road trip.
- [Why Tempo Traveller is Best for Group Travel](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/blog/why-tempo-traveller-is-best-for-groups/): Learn why tempo travellers are the preferred choice for family trips, corporate outings and group tours.

## Media Library & Videos
- [Bengaluru Airport Taxi Pickup Experience & Guide](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/media/bengaluru-airport-taxi-pickup-guide/): Watch our step-by-step video guide on how to locate your taxi at Bengaluru Airport (KIA) and get a hassle-free pickup.
- [One Way Cab Guide: Bengaluru to Mysore](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/media/mysore-one-way-taxi-guide/): A comprehensive video walkthrough of our outstation one-way taxi service from Bengaluru to Mysore, including route details.
- [Luxury Tempo Traveller Tour](https://www.abhaytravels.co.in/media/premium-traveller-video-tour/): Take a virtual tour inside our premium 12-seater luxury Tempo Traveller, perfect for family getaways and corporate trips.
